title: Bitcoin (BTC) Price Prediction for May
description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has spent two weeks pounding on $79,000 and getting knocked back every time. BTC is trading around $78,000 right now after a strong April—up 14% on the month—but it still can’t break above $80,000. Four things in May could decide where Bitcoin trades by the month’s end. title: Best Crypto to Buy in May: 3 Cryptos to Watch as the Market Enters Its Most Catalyst-Heavy Month
description: The crypto market starts May trying to shake off a brutal Q1 and a slow recovery in April. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) trades around $77,000 after briefly reaching $79,000, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) hovers near $1.37 after pulling in $82 million in April ETF inflows, and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) has just broken above $2,300.
